hero.section: relative py-20 px-4 bg-gradient-to-b from-[#f0f9ff] via-white to-transparent overflow-hidden
hero.blob1: absolute top-1/2 left-1/2 transform -translate-x-1/2 -translate-y-1/2 w-[600px] h-[600px] bg-gradient-to-bl from-[#0a91b1]/10 to-blue-500/10 rounded-full blur-3xl animate-blob animation-delay-4000
hero.blob2: absolute top-1/2 left-1/2 transform -translate-x-1/2 -translate-y-1/2 w-[500px] h-[500px] bg-gradient-to-tr from-sky-500/10 to-[#0a91b1]/10 rounded-full blur-3xl animate-blob
hero.subtitle: inline-block px-4 py-1.5 mb-4 text-sm font-medium rounded-full bg-[#0a91b1]/10 text-[#0a91b1] border border-[#0a91b1]/20
hero.title: text-4xl md:text-5xl font-bold text-gray-900 mb-6

step.lineConnector: after:content-[""] after:absolute after:top-1/2 after:left-1/2 after:w-full after:h-0.5 after:bg-gray-200 after:-z-10

circle.inactive: w-10 h-10 rounded-full bg-[#0a91b1]/10 flex items-center justify-center transition-colors
circle.active: w-10 h-10 rounded-full bg-[#0a91b1] flex items-center justify-center transition-colors

step.title: absolute mt-16 text-sm font-medium text-gray-600 whitespace-nowrap

bookingSteps.card: bg-white p-8 rounded-2xl shadow-lg border border-gray-100
bookingSteps.title: text-2xl font-bold text-gray-900 mb-6

serviceSelection.serviceCard: p-4 rounded-xl bg-gray-50 cursor-pointer transition-all duration-300 service-card

dateTimeSelection.label: block text-sm font-medium text-gray-700 mb-2
dateTimeSelection.input: w-full px-4 py-2.5 bg-white border border-gray-200 rounded-lg focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#0a91b1]/20 focus:border-[#0a91b1] transition-colors

personalInfo.label: block text-sm font-medium text-gray-700 mb-2
personalInfo.input: w-full px-4 py-2.5 bg-white border border-gray-200 rounded-lg focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#0a91b1]/20 focus:border-[#0a91b1] transition-colors

buttons.next: bg-[#0a91b1] text-white px-6 py-3 rounded-lg font-semibold hover:bg-[#097d99] transition-all duration-300 disabled:opacity-50 disabled:cursor-not-allowed
buttons.back: px-6 py-3 rounded-lg font-semibold text-gray-700 hover:bg-gray-100 transition-colors
buttons.confirm: bg-[#0a91b1] text-white px-6 py-3 rounded-lg font-semibold hover:bg-[#097d99] transition-all duration-300

tailwindConfig.label: block text-sm font-medium text-gray-700 mb-2
tailwindConfig.input: w-full px-4 py-2.5 bg-white border border-gray-200 rounded-lg focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#0a91b1]/20 focus:border-[#0a91b1] transition-colors
tailwindConfig.select: w-full px-4 py-2.5 bg-white border border-gray-200 rounded-lg focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#0a91b1]/20 focus:border-[#0a91b1] transition-colors
tailwindConfig.textarea: w-full px-4 py-2.5 bg-white border border-gray-200 rounded-lg focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#0a91b1]/20 focus:border-[#0a91b1] transition-colors
tailwindConfig.submitButton: w-full md:w-auto px-6 py-3 bg-[#0a91b1] text-white rounded-lg font-semibold hover:bg-[#097d99] transition-all duration-300

animations.blob: keyframes { 0% { transform: translate(-50%, -50%) scale(1) rotate(0deg); } 33% { transform: translate(-50%, -50%) scale(1.1) rotate(120deg); } 66% { transform: translate(-50%, -50%) scale(0.9) rotate(240deg); } 100% { transform: translate(-50%, -50%) scale(1) rotate(360deg); } }
animations.serviceCardHover: background-color: rgba(10, 145, 177, 0.05); transform: translateY(-1px); box-shadow: 0 2px 4px -1px rgb(10 145 177 / 0.1);
animations.serviceCardSelected: background-color: rgba(10, 145, 177, 0.1); border: 2px solid #0a91b1; transform: translateY(-2px); box-shadow: 0 4px 6px -1px rgb(10 145 177 / 0.1), 0 2px 4px -2px rgb(10 145 177 / 0.1);
